Package org.eventb.ui.prover.tests

Class DefaultPositionApplicationTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.ui.prover.tests.DefaultPositionApplicationTests
public class DefaultPositionApplicationTests extends Object
Tests the default operator position computed by DefaultTacticProvider.DefaultPositionApplication.
